headline: HSIC Q1 Earnings & Revenues Surpass Estimates, Gross Margin Rises
summary: Henry Schein tops Q1 estimates with 14.8% EPS growth and rising margins, as strong segment performance and market share gains drive solid revenue expansion.

raw.headline: HSIC Q1 Earnings & Revenues Surpass Estimates, Gross Margin Rises

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stock with Competitive Advantages and 2 We Turn Down
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.
